milestone: R9 Isolated QA and Continuity-Managed Milestone Execution Pilot

limitations.statement: R9-004 landed an external-runner identity and limitation model only; no concrete CI or external runner artifact identity is claimed.
The R9-006 pilot uses local isolated QA evidence only and does not claim external QA proof.
R9-003 defines the final remote-head support model; exact post-push verification for a final landed closeout commit cannot be committed inside the same commit it verifies.
R9-006 proves one tiny bounded segmented control path only, not broad milestone automation.
R9 makes Codex disposable through durable segment state; it does not solve Codex context compaction.
R9 does not prove unattended automatic resume or hours-long unattended milestone execution.
